hero.question: Will Duke win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take: At 22%, the crowd is pricing Duke as a fringe Elite Eight team, which feels about right for a program that's rebuilt from scratch and still learning how to close tournaments. Watch whether the March roster actually develops the perimeter shooting and defensive intensity that separate one-seeds from Sweet 16 exits, because that gap is exactly what separates this market from 28%.

daily_take.headline: Duke's Tournament Odds Tank. Smart Money Sees Coach K's Heir Apparent Crumbling.
daily_take.deck: Duke dropped 1 point overnight to 22%, continuing a quiet bleed that signals real conviction from sharp bettors. The math doesn't support the decline yet, teams this talented don't crater without roster news. The play: wait for stabilization below 20% before adding, or fade the fade if you see institutional buying reappear.
